checks.message: absolute total-return fraction difference: B1 total_return - historical B0 total_return
abs(B0 max_drawdown) - abs(B1 max_drawdown); positive means drawdown improved
absolute cumulative-turnover difference: B1 turnover - historical B0 turnover
historical B0 reports zero turnover, so it is not a valid rebalance comparator
historical B1 positive turnover can come from static target rebalancing drift, not only execution control
B1 - historical B0 mixes execution/no-trade controls with the introduction of static target rebalancing
